description: Implement KMS-backed crypto key rotation; Tier 3 verifies no plaintext leaks.
task_description: Add a key rotation flow for app-level secret encryption keys. Old ciphertexts must remain readable. New ciphertexts use the new key. Annotate the rotation + decryption helpers @critical. Tier 3 Dafny proof: no plaintext written outside the explicit decrypt() return.
